chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Direct Offspring

text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ اَلثَّانِي عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ رَجُلٌ هَلَكَ وَ تَرَكَ اِبْنَتَهُ وَ عَمَّهُ فَقَالَ "اَلْمَالُ لِلاِبْنَةِ" قَالَ وَ قُلْتُ لَهُ رَجُلٌ مَاتَ وَ تَرَكَ اِبْنَةً لَهُ وَ أَخاً أَوْ قَالَ اِبْنَ أَخِيهِ قَالَ فَسَكَتَ طَوِيلاً ثُمَّ قَالَ "اَلْمَالُ لِلاِبْنَةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5607 - It is narrated from Al-Bazanti who said: I said to Abu Ja'far Al-Thani (as):
"May I be sacrificed for you! A man has died and left behind his daughter and his paternal uncle."
Imam (as) replied: "The entire wealth belongs to the daughter."
Al-Bazanti further said: I asked Imam (as), "A man has died and left behind his daughter and a (his) brother", or he said, "the son of his brother."
Imam (as) remained silent for a long time and said: "The entire wealth belongs to the daughter."
